seoTitle: Mount Enniskillen vs Mount Forbes — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Enniskillen and Mount Forbes. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Enniskillen vs Mount Forbes: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Enniskillen and Mount Forbes.
heading: Mount Enniskillen vs Mount Forbes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Enniskillen, Queensland and Mount Forbes, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Enniskillen has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Mount Forbes (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Enniskillen or Mount Forbes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Enniskillen has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Mount Forbes scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Enniskillen scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Forbes scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Enniskillen or Mount Forbes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Enniskillen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
